creator: webmaster@kibab.com
text:
Approved, thanks!
Please commit this fix.

Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

Maintainer of net-im/qutim, Please note that PR ports/156530 has just been submitted. If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch and a committer will take care of it. The full text of the PR can be found at: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/156530 -- Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool edwin@FreeBSD.org !DSPAM:4daf5e9110431598253352!

Sent from my Android phone with K-9 Mail. Please excuse my brevity.
